title: PlanBench
description: Return the final answer for each PlanBench task_1 plan-generation prompt in the local unified dataset runtime, with upstream-compatible text_to_plan parsing plus semantic VAL validation.
baseline_summary: A placeholder dataset-level solver template that returns no plan for the active PlanBench prompt.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher valid-plan rate is better across independently evolved PlanBench prompts.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return the final plan text for the current PlanBench prompt so the upstream task_1 text_to_plan parser can extract and semantically validate it against the official instance. You may return either a list[str] with one official-style action line per step or a newline-separated string of official-style action lines. Return natural-language or official object-token action text accepted by PlanBench task_1 parsing; do not return parenthesized PDDL. Preserve the declared helper symbols when useful. Do not use browsing or external network access.
